title: Xtra Pungent Vietnamese Onion Grill
description: A pungent and festive Vietnamese dish featuring chopped onion and double-rise-bread, perfect for a snack or light meal. This egg-free-friendly recipe is designed for a raclette-grill.
instructions: Preheat the raclette-grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the chopped onion with vegetable oil, fish sauce, lime juice, grilled chili flakes, salt, and black pepper until the onion is evenly coated.
Arrange the double-rise-bread cubes on the raclette-grill.
Top each bread cube with a spoonful of the onion mixture.
Close the raclette-grill and cook for 10 minutes or until the bread is toasted and the onion is caramelized.
Open the raclette-grill and stir the onion mixture.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the onion is crispy.
Remove the Xtra Pungent Vietnamese Onion Grill from the raclette-grill and serve immediately.
